description: A failed pre-upgrade hook leaves the release wedged in pending-upgrade.
body: Failure mode: a pre-upgrade hook Job never completes (bad migration, missing image, no delete policy), so Helm leaves the release in pending-upgrade and subsequent upgrades refuse to run. Detection signals: helm status shows pending-upgrade, the hook Job is stuck or failed, and helm upgrade errors that another operation is in progress. Do not delete the release secret to force it. Safer fallback: inspect the hook Job events, fix or remove the failing hook, set a hook-delete-policy, then helm rollback to the last deployed revision or re-run the upgrade once the hook can complete.
